# MSMEMate

> MSMEMate ("Bridging Bharat's Businesses") is an AI-native onboarding platform
> that takes India's micro and small enterprises (MSMEs/MSEs) from Udyam
> registration to selling on ONDC — the Open Network for Digital Commerce
> incubated by DPIIT, Government of India. Built by Team XphoraAI for the
> IndiaAI Innovation Challenge 2026 (Problem Statement 2), facilitated through
> NSIC's review model.

MSMEMate is voice-first and multilingual: business owners can register by
speaking in Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Bengali, Marathi, Gujarati and more. The
platform reads Udyam certificates, PAN and GST documents from photos or PDFs,
classifies each business into the correct ONDC domain and category, and ranks
ONDC Seller Network Participants (seller apps) that fit the business's
category, district and language — with human-readable explanations and human
(NSIC officer) approval of official allocations. All AI runs on sovereign
Indian infrastructure and services; personal data is handled under India's
DPDP Act 2023 with data residency in India.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.msmemate.com/): what MSMEMate does and who it serves
- [Register](https://www.msmemate.com/register): free, public, voice-first MSE registration
- [Blog](https://www.msmemate.com/blog): plain-language ONDC and MSME guides
- [ONDC by City](https://www.msmemate.com/ondc): city-by-city guides for India's MSME clusters (Moradabad brass, Varanasi silk, Tirupur knitwear and more)
- [DPDP Compliance](https://www.msmemate.com/dpdp): how the platform implements the DPDP Act 2023
- [Sovereign AI](https://www.msmemate.com/sovereign-ai): Indian AI stack, explainability, human oversight
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.msmemate.com/privacy): DPDP Act 2023 compliance, India data residency
- [Terms & Conditions](https://www.msmemate.com/terms): terms of use

## Guides

- [What is ONDC? A Simple Guide for Indian MSMEs](https://www.msmemate.com/blog/what-is-ondc-guide-for-msmes)
- [From Udyam to ONDC: Take Your MSME Online, Step by Step](https://www.msmemate.com/blog/udyam-to-ondc-step-by-step)
- [How to Choose the Right ONDC Seller App for Your Business](https://www.msmemate.com/blog/choose-ondc-seller-app)

## Facts

- Product name: MSMEMate (formerly AgentMap AI)
- Team: XphoraAI — Suchi Bansal, Aakashdeep Srivastava, Vishalika
- Modules: Sathi (voice registration), VargBot (ONDC taxonomy classification),
  JodakAI (MSE-to-seller-app matching)
- Registration is free for MSEs; a Udyam number is the profile anchor
- Compliance: DPDP Act 2023, Indian data residency, full AI audit trail
